TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241547. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 1 side b of tape: A mixture of working songs and songs for entertainment to tribal tunes. The song titles are: 1) Romance of Young Girl; 2) Harvest Song and Dance; 3) Welcome Song; 4) Extreme Happiness. Recorded in Dec 1965.
